```{r}
#| label: tbl-dt-online-update
#| tbl-cap: "Governed online-update contract for digital-twin states and parameters"
#| echo: false

dt <- read.csv("tables/table_dt_03_online_update_contract.csv", check.names = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
knitr::kable(dt, booktabs = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)
```
